name: CaseStatusEnquiry
description: Handles citizen requests to check the status or progress of an existing case or application.
triggerPhrases: What's the status of my case
Can I get an update on my application
What's the timeline for my application
I want to know the status of my case

entities.name: caseNumber
entities.prompt: Do you have your case reference number?

entities.name: citizenEmail
entities.prompt: Could I have the email address you used when you first contacted us?

actions.description: Look up the case status directly from Dataverse using the case number or citizen email.

parameters.note: ticketnumber is looked up directly on incident; emailaddress1 is looked up by joining to the customerid (contact) record.

responseTemplate: Your case {caseNumber} is currently {caseStatus.ombudlens_substatus}. {caseStatus.ombudlens_aisummary}. The expected completion date is {caseStatus.ombudlens_sladuedate}.
confirmationMessage: I've pulled up the latest status for your case.
fallbackMessage: I wasn't able to find a case matching those details. Would you like to speak with an officer?
